generated_oml:
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring input current for robotic joint"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring angular velocity of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensorFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring position of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensorFirstAxis
]

instance InputCurrentRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current sensor data transmitted over MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomProcessingLogic
]

instance AngularVelocityRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular velocity sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, AASExecutor, Thingsboard
]

instance PositionRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, AASExecutor, Thingsboard
]

instance InputCurrentFilteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Low-pass filtered input current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, AASExecutor, Thingsboard
]

instance RealTimeAdaptiveFrictionCompensation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time adaptive friction compensation for robot joints using physics-based and data-driven models"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustJointParameters
]

instance AdjustJointParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjust joint parameters to compensate for friction variations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenance : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance through anomaly detection in friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnomalyInsight
]

instance FrictionAnomalyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating potential friction anomalies for predictive maintenance"
]

instance SimulationBasedOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based optimization of cutting parameters to reduce CO2 emissions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedCuttingParameters
]

instance OptimizedCuttingParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimized cutting parameters for reduced CO2 emissions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ProductQualityPrediction : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Product quality prediction from production data"
    DTDFVocab:provides QualityPredictionInsight
]

instance QualityPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight predicting product quality based on production data"
]

instance DynamicModelParameterUpdate : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic updating of model parameters to compensate for wear, temperature changes, and payload variations"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateModelParameters
]

instance UpdateModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically update model parameters for wear, temperature, and payload compensation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomProcessingLogic : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom C++/Java processing logic for low-pass filtering of input current data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeAdaptiveFrictionCompensation
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for publish-subscribe communication of sensor data"
]

instance AASExecutor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell Executor for processing and populating measured, simulated, and reference values into Thingsboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables ProductQualityPrediction, DynamicModelParameterUpdate
]

instance Thingsboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Thingsboard platform for digital shadow data storage and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ProductQualityPrediction
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for physics-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeAdaptiveFrictionCompensation, SimulationBasedOptimization
]

instance MachineLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    base:desc "ACME model for architectural description"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEEnabler

instance SMArDTModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SMArDT model for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SMArDTEnabler

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains InputCurrentSensor, AngularVelocitySensor, PositionSensorFirstAxis, CustomProcessingLogic, MQTTBroker, AASExecutor, Thingsboard, SimulinkEnabler, MachineLearningEnabler, SysMLEnabler, AADLEnabler, MontiArcEnabler, ACMEEnabler, SMArDTEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with dead time constraints in the control system for dynamic adaptation of physics-based and data-driven friction models as operating conditions change, supported by MQTT and ThingsBoard for data flow."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration through Asset Administration Shell (AAS) integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models via FMI, and MQTT for data flow, with ThingsBoard for real-time visualization and monitoring."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model reliability depends on traceability and verification of transformations between modeling languages (e.g., SysML to simulation models). Uncertainty sources like wear, temperature changes, and varying payloads are mitigated through dynamic parameter updates and neural network retraining using real-time data. Anomaly detection in friction behavior supports predictive maintenance, ensuring high precision in positioning and process quality."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs MQTT protocol with a publish-subscribe architecture for network communication, where data is transmitted as JSON over hierarchically structured topics with configurable read/write permissions for user access control. No specific bandwidth or latency requirements are documented."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration via Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for Industry 4.0 interoperability, utilizing MQTT for IoT data exchange with ThingsBoard, and supporting multi-domain modeling through SysML and Simulink via FMI to interface with external systems such as production planning and CNC diagnostics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes standardized modeling languages such as SysML for systems engineering, AADL (SAE standard) for architecture description, and ACME for component-based system modeling. These standards support structured representation of components, interfaces, and behaviors across multiple abstraction levels and enable integration with simulation tools like Simulink."
]
